message:
🌱 opentelemetry-operator: TargetAllocator for daemonset (#1871)

* 🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: TargetAllocator for daemonset mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: TargetAllocator for daemonset mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-1828-targetallocator-for-daemonset",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: TargetAllocator for daemonset",
+    "description": "TargetAllocator for daemonset. Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-operator deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-operator version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-operator 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-operator installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nIdeally, when deployed as a daemonset, collectors would scrape the pods running on the node\nlocal to the daemonset instance. It's not obvious from the docs or configs as to if that is achievable\nwith the current targetAllocator strategies."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for TargetAllocator for daemonset",
+        "description": "Introduces new allocation strategy \"per node\" that is intended to distribute targets to collectors on the basis of the node on which the targets reside, i.e. each collector will be instructed to scrape targers running on the collector's node.\n\nThis strategy is intended to be only used with a collector in `deamonset` mode (running as agent on each node). It's not suitable for other modes.\n\n- Added unit tests\n- Also did manual testing\n\nUpdated API documentation.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"TargetAllocator for daemonset\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Introduces new allocation strategy \"per node\" that is intended to distribute targets to collectors on the basis of the node on which the targets reside, i.e. each collector will be instructed to scrape targers running on the collector's node.\n\nThis strategy is intended to be only used with a collector in `deamonset` mode (running as agent on each node). It's not suitable for other modes.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Daemonset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/1828",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/2430"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:49:31.317Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
